hero.title: Sunset Pulse
hero.subtitle: Advanced Portfolio Discovery & Asset Intelligence
hero.description: Institutional-grade tools designed for market precision. Access live telemetry and data-driven insights for North Texas real estate.

mls_efficiency.title: High-Frequency Discovery
mls_efficiency.description: Our high-performance backend provides real-time synchronization with regional markets. Filter assets by yield, submarket momentum, and institutional-grade criteria.

spatial_search.title: Interactive Geospatial Analysis
spatial_search.description: Our spatial engine provides interactive visualizations for evaluating asset flow and neighborhood context. Make informed decisions with dimensional accuracy.

backend_integrity.title: Secure Infrastructure
backend_integrity.description: A robust architecture ensures your portfolio preferences and private data remain secure and persistent across all devices.

items.question: How does the search engine optimize my criteria?
items.answer: The platform utilizes semantic analysis to prioritize results based on your specific investment goals. It cross-references market yields and submarket growth signals to identify opportunities that meet institutional standards.

items.question: What are the benefits of Geospatial Search?
items.answer: Geospatial search allows you to define parameters based on submarket corridors and proximity to infrastructure, identifying high-yield assets that traditional filters may overlook.

items.question: How do I utilize the 3D Asset Evaluation tool?
items.answer: Within any property profile, you can activate the interactive viewer. This provides an accurate representation of the layout and spatial context, allowing for detailed site assessment from any device.

items.question: Is the market data truly real-time?
items.answer: Yes. Our systems maintain persistent links to regional data providers. When a property status changes or a new asset is listed, the platform reflects those updates immediately.

items.question: Can I save custom submarket search areas?
items.answer: Yes. Use the polygon tool in the Explorer to define custom boundaries. You can save these regions to your watch list for automated status updates and market alerts.
